one_time_description: Claim proceeds received in fiscal 2022, non-recurring settlement/claim income
economic_notes: Lucky Man Cree Nation has the smallest membership within Treaty 6. Member of Battlefords Tribal Council (BTC), which has investments in property, hotels, and gaming. Legacy Trust held with CIBC Private Wealth Management valued at $4,275,109. Loan facility from CIBC secured by Legacy Trust.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Auditor is a sole practitioner (Gabriel Ng CPA P.C. Inc.) signing November 17, 2025 — significant delay in audit completion. Large one-time claim proceeds of $1,926,720 dominate the surplus. Funds Held in Trust includes Ottawa Trust funds ($1,772,216) and Legacy Trust ($4,275,109) totalling $6,047,325 on balance sheet. Loan facility of $1,035,202 from CIBC secured by Legacy Trust. No tangible capital assets remain (all fully depreciated). No schedule of remuneration provided. expenses_salaries_total is sum of wages and benefits across all schedules: Band Support $87,702 + Community Infrastructure $91,958 + Land Development $35,465 + Other Project Revenue $73,715 = $288,840. total_government_transfers includes ISC $666,092 + Battlefords Tribal Council $8,000 = $674,092 (Keyanow $10,000 also included bringing total to $682,092 if treated as government transfer). OSR calculated as total revenue $2,830,809 minus government transfers $682,092 = $2,148,717.
